---
name: Policy proposal
about: Suggest or refine a policy position
title: "[Policy] "
labels: policy
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What issue in Ghent (or Flanders) are we addressing?

## Proposal

What should we do? Be specific.

## Evidence

Links, data, examples from other cities.

## Trade-offs

What does this cost? Who loses? What won't we do?

## Fits our principles?

- [ ] Economically liberal
- [ ] Evidence-based
- [ ] Locally actionable in Ghent
- [ ] Fiscally honest
